top_signals.title: ChatGPT share links abused to host fake outage pages to deliver malware
top_signals.summary: Threat actors are abusing ChatGPT's content-sharing feature to display fake OpenAI outage pages that direct users to download malware disguised as the ChatGPT desktop application. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
